title: orthochilus baumianus
intro: Orthochilus baumianus, also known as Baum's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Orthochilus baumianus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
